text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > General Consumer Complaints 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CITY OF PORTLAND CITY OF PORTLAND INDEPENDENT POLICE REVIEW DIVISION INDEPENDENT POLICE REVIEW DIVISION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts commendations from the public for good police work, as well as accepting and investigating complaints of Portland Police Bureau (PPB) misconduct. Independent Police Review division offers civilian oversight of Portland Police Bureau, monitors internal affairs investigations, and recommends policy changes to City Council and Chief of Police. 1221 SW 4th Avenue Room 140 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm In person: Tuesday-Thursday 9am-4pm Email (503) 823-4571 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE CONSUMER PROTECTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about scams, fraud, and other threats to consumers. Includes a consumer hotline and online portal for reporting consumer complaints, scams, and fraud. The Scam Alert Network provides email alerts and social media posts about current scams. 1162 Court Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (887) 887-9392 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF PORTLAND INDEPENDENT POLICE REVIEW DIVISION OREGON DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE CONSUMER PROTECTION
